build.buildCommand: npm ci --include=dev && npx prisma generate --schema web/prisma/schema.prisma

deploy.startCommand: npx concurrently -n market-data,market-maker,liquidation,sweeper,chain-watcher "npx tsx services/market-data/src/index.ts" "npx tsx services/market-maker/src/index.ts" "npx tsx services/liquidation-engine/src/index.ts" "npx tsx services/sweeper/src/index.ts" "npx tsx services/chain-watcher/src/index.ts"
